title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
